content.problemStatement:
Given an array of integers AAA, write a program to count the number of even and odd elements in the given array.


Input Format

The first line contains an integer NNN, denoting the size of the array.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers, representing the elements of the array.


Output Format
Print two space-separated integers, the first representing the number of even elements and the second representing the number of odd elements in the array.
